# mailgun_domain_tracking (Data Source)

Retrieves tracking settings for a Mailgun domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to retrieve tracking settings for.

### Read-Only

- `click_active` (Boolean) Whether click tracking is enabled.
- `open_active` (Boolean) Whether open tracking is enabled.
- `unsubscribe_active` (Boolean) Whether unsubscribe tracking is enabled.
- `unsubscribe_html_footer` (String) Custom HTML footer for unsubscribe links.
- `unsubscribe_text_footer` (String) Custom text footer for unsubscribe links.
